question_text: Let {рқ‘Ѓ(рқ‘Ұ)}рқ‘Ұв‰Ө0 be a Poisson process with rate рқњ†, where рқњ†> 0 is an unknown parameter. Staring from the origin, an intercity road has рқ‘Ѓ(рқ‘Ұ) number of potholes up to a distance of рқ‘Ұ kilometers. Starting from the origin, potholes are found at the following distances (in kilometers) вЃҰвЃҰвЃҰвЃҰвЃҰвЃҰвЃҰвЃҰвЃҰ0.9, 1.3, 1.8, 2.7, 3.4, 4.1, 4.7, 5.5, 6.2, 6.8, 7.4, 8.1, 8.9, 9.2, 9.7.

options.B: ased on the above data, the method of moment estimate of рқњ† equals __________ (rounded off to two decimal places).
